title: euodia sandwicensis
intro: Euodia sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian Euodia or Mountain Euodia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to have potential medicinal uses. The health benefits of Euodia sandwicensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Euodia sandwicensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
